detail.description:
Lead a wild zombie horde across the globe. Turn pedestrians into zombies, grow your swarm, and destroy everything in your path.

Collect crazy power-ups, unlock upgrades, hatch zombie birds, and take on 300+ missions in this fast, chaotic endless runner.

Join over 500 million players worldwide.

FEATURES
• Easy one-touch controls
• Grow the ultimate zombie horde
• Smash through cars, buses, tanks, planes, and more
• Unlock 10 insane bonuses, including ninjas, dragons, and UFOs
• Collect zombie
